chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 598 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, AAG. ***************** Mr. Shamshad Ali Shah Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6, taken on record. Statement has been filed on behalf of S.S.P Khairpur which is also taken on record. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This petition filed in the year 2020 and lastly fixed before the Court on 14.10.2020 thereafter no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
